description_long: This cabinetry unit features a modern, geometric design with a combination of open shelving, closed compartments, and integrated appliances. The exterior is finished in a striped wood and black pattern, creating a visually striking effect. The upper section includes open cubbyholes and angled shelves, ideal for storing bottles or small items, while the lower section houses drawers, cabinets, and a built-in oven and stovetop. A metallic sink and range hood are also integrated, suggesting a kitchen or bar application. The cabinetry appears modular, with a mix of horizontal and vertical storage spaces. The overall construction is robust, likely using engineered wood with metal hardware and fixtures.
description: A modern, striped wood and black cabinetry unit with open shelves, closed compartments, and integrated kitchen appliances. Features include a sink, oven, stovetop, and geometric shelving.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full arrangement of open shelves, closed cabinets, integrated oven, stovetop, sink, and range hood.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the cabinetry and the layered construction of the compartments.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the striped wood pattern and the geometric arrangement of the shelving without visible appliances.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thickness and solid construction of the cabinetry, with minimal detail visible.
attribute_cabinet_type: base cabinet with integrated appliances and open shelving
attribute_door_configuration: combination of open shelf and single door
